message:
fix(fab): correct z-index to stay above bottom sheet

Changed FAB open state z-index from modal-backdrop + 10 to modal + 10.

Rationale: The close button should appear above the bottom sheet it
controls (which uses z-modal), not just above the backdrop. Using
z-modal-backdrop + 10 could leave the FAB behind the sheet in some
stacking contexts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
